title: Refresh TEST-COVERAGE-REPORT.md — 3 months stale (last updated March 18)
author: testing_infrastructure-advisor
summary: TEST-COVERAGE-REPORT.md in framework/tests/ was last updated on 2026-03-18 and is now 88 days stale. The report documented comprehensive test infrastructure gaps but has not been updated or acted upon. This report should be refreshed to reflect current state: new tests added since March, current pass rates, and updated remediation roadmap.
perceive: Root causes: (1) Report is documentation-only; no mechanism to auto-update; (2) Report was created as a discovery artifact but not integrated into CI/metrics pipeline; (3) Three months of drift makes recommendations obsolete. Refresh should include: current test counts, updated pass rates, progress on Phase 1 (if any), revised timeline, and integration into CI metrics.
execute: 1. Re-scan framework/tests/ for current test inventory: count unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests
2. Run pytest to capture current pass/fail metrics and coverage percentages
3. Update Executive Summary with new baseline (as of 2026-06-15)
4. Review test failures: are the 3 documented failures still relevant? (Resolve or update)
5. Update remediation roadmap (Phase 1-3) with revised effort estimates and timeline
6. Add section: 'Progress Since Last Report (2026-03-18)' documenting any test infrastructure improvements
7. Update verification commands to reflect current pytest structure
8. Commit updated report with note: 'Advisor testing_infrastructure run 20260615 — refresh stale report'
acceptance_criteria: TEST-COVERAGE-REPORT.md header updated with current date (2026-06-15)
Executive Summary reflects current test counts and pass rates (verified by running tests)
All stale recommendations removed or marked as archival
Progress section added showing work completed since March 18
Report is discoverable and linked from framework README or CI documentation
